question text: If the car spins in a circle instead of going straight, what should you check?
answers: [{'answer_text': 'Check if the axles (dowels) are parallel and straight.', 'text': 'Check if the axles (dowels) are parallel and straight.', 'weight': 100}, {'answer_text': 'Check if the balloon is pink.', 'text': 'Check if the balloon is pink.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Check if the room is too hot.', 'text': 'Check if the room is too hot.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Check if the finish line is crooked.', 'text': 'Check if the finish line is crooked.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Check if the teacher is watching.', 'text': 'Check if the teacher is watching.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Check if the glue is dry.', 'text': 'Check if the glue is dry.', 'weight': 0}]
a: Check if the axles (dowels) are parallel and straight.
b: Check if the balloon is pink.
c: Check if the room is too hot.
d: Check if the finish line is crooked.
e: Check if the teacher is watching.
f: Check if the glue is dry.

question text: What causes the "hiss" sound when you open a can of soda?
answers: [{'answer_text': 'The liquid is boiling.', 'text': 'The liquid is boiling.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'The release of compressed gas from inside the can.', 'text': 'The release of compressed gas from inside the can.', 'weight': 100}, {'answer_text': 'The cold temperature cracking the can.', 'text': 'The cold temperature cracking the can.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Someone shaking the can.', 'text': 'Someone shaking the can.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'The metal breaking.', 'text': 'The metal breaking.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'The sugar dissolving.', 'text': 'The sugar dissolving.', 'weight': 0}]
b: The release of compressed gas from inside the can.
c: The cold temperature cracking the can.

question text: What is the first step you should do in the Design Process?
answers: [{'answer_text': 'Test the car immediately.', 'text': 'Test the car immediately.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Glue everything together.', 'text': 'Glue everything together.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Plan and think about how to use the materials.', 'text': 'Plan and think about how to use the materials.', 'weight': 100}, {'answer_text': 'Evaluate the results.', 'text': 'Evaluate the results.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Ask the teacher for the answer.', 'text': 'Ask the teacher for the answer.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Play with the balloons.', 'text': 'Play with the balloons.', 'weight': 0}]
c: Plan and think about how to use the materials.
e: Ask the teacher for the answer.

question text: If one student in your group is not helping, what is a good way to include them?
answers: [{'answer_text': 'Yell at them to work.', 'text': 'Yell at them to work.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Ignore them and do the project yourself.', 'text': 'Ignore them and do the project yourself.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Give them a specific small job, like measuring the axle or cutting tape.', 'text': 'Give them a specific small job, like measuring the axle or cutting tape.', 'weight': 100}, {'answer_text': 'Tell the teacher to remove them from the group.', 'text': 'Tell the teacher to remove them from the group.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Wait until the end to talk to them.', 'text': 'Wait until the end to talk to them.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Hide the materials from them.', 'text': 'Hide the materials from them.', 'weight': 0}]
b: Ignore them and do the project yourself.
c: Give them a specific small job, like measuring the axle or cutting tape.
d: Tell the teacher to remove them from the group.
e: Wait until the end to talk to them.

question text: If your balloon drags on the floor and stops the car from moving, what is the best solution?
answers: [{'answer_text': 'Get a bigger balloon so it drags more.', 'text': 'Get a bigger balloon so it drags more.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Cut a hole in the balloon.', 'text': 'Cut a hole in the balloon.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Take the wheels off the car.', 'text': 'Take the wheels off the car.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Push the car with your hand.', 'text': 'Push the car with your hand.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Tape the balloon higher up or change its position.', 'text': 'Tape the balloon higher up or change its position.', 'weight': 100}, {'answer_text': 'Give up and stop working.', 'text': 'Give up and stop working.', 'weight': 0}]
a: Get a bigger balloon so it drags more.
b: Cut a hole in the balloon.
c: Take the wheels off the car.
d: Push the car with your hand.
e: Tape the balloon higher up or change its position.

question text: If your group disagrees on how to build the car, what is the best way to solve the problem?
answers: [{'answer_text': 'Let the loudest student decide.', 'text': 'Let the loudest student decide.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Build two different quick models (prototypes) or vote on the best idea.', 'text': 'Build two different quick models (prototypes) or vote on the best idea.', 'weight': 100}, {'answer_text': 'Argue until the class ends.', 'text': 'Argue until the class ends.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Split up and work alone.', 'text': 'Split up and work alone.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Do nothing.', 'text': 'Do nothing.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': "Copy another group's design.", 'text': "Copy another group's design.", 'weight': 0}]
b: Build two different quick models (prototypes) or vote on the best idea.

question text: What should you do immediately after you test your car?
answers: [{'answer_text': 'Throw the car away.', 'text': 'Throw the car away.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Say "we finished" and stop working.', 'text': 'Say "we finished" and stop working.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Draw a picture of a rocket.', 'text': 'Draw a picture of a rocket.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Change the rules of the challenge.', 'text': 'Change the rules of the challenge.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'Evaluate the performance and decide what to change (Redesign).', 'text': 'Evaluate the performance and decide what to change (Redesign).', 'weight': 100}, {'answer_text': 'Go to recess.', 'text': 'Go to recess.', 'weight': 0}]
c: Draw a picture of a rocket.
d: Change the rules of the challenge.
e: Evaluate the performance and decide what to change (Redesign).

question text: Real space rockets work using the same physics principle as your balloon car. How is the force generated to move them?
answers: [{'answer_text': 'By the wind blowing against the nose cone.', 'text': 'By the wind blowing against the nose cone.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'By magnets on the launch pad.', 'text': 'By magnets on the launch pad.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'By pulling against the gravity of the moon.', 'text': 'By pulling against the gravity of the moon.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'By burning fuel to create gas that shoots out the back, pushing the rocket forward.', 'text': 'By burning fuel to create gas that shoots out the back, pushing the rocket forward.', 'weight': 100}, {'answer_text': 'By the pilot pedaling very fast.', 'text': 'By the pilot pedaling very fast.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'By the heat of the sun.', 'text': 'By the heat of the sun.', 'weight': 0}]
a: By the wind blowing against the nose cone.
b: By magnets on the launch pad.
c: By pulling against the gravity of the moon.
d: By burning fuel to create gas that shoots out the back, pushing the rocket forward.
e: By the pilot pedaling very fast.
f: By the heat of the sun.

question text: If the air leaks out of the balloon too fast and the wheels spin but the car doesn't move forward (it slips), what might be the problem?
answers: [{'answer_text': 'The car is too light.', 'text': 'The car is too light.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'The floor is too slippery (not enough traction).', 'text': 'The floor is too slippery (not enough traction).', 'weight': 100}, {'answer_text': 'The balloon is too small.', 'text': 'The balloon is too small.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'The axles are too long.', 'text': 'The axles are too long.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'The tape is the wrong color.', 'text': 'The tape is the wrong color.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'The room is too windy.', 'text': 'The room is too windy.', 'weight': 0}]
b: The floor is too slippery (not enough traction).
e: The tape is the wrong color.
